description: Cocyclic Hadamard matrices are developed from 2-cocycles over a group G. For order 668, we seek a group G of order 668 and a cocycle psi: GxG -> {+/-1} such that M[g,h] = psi(g,h) is Hadamard. Transforms brute-force search into group cohomology computation.
mathematical_formalization: Given G with |G| = 668, compute H^2(G, Z_2). For each [psi], form M_{g,h} = psi(g,h). Test: M M^T = 668 I.
implementation_hypothesis: Use GAP to enumerate H^2(G, Z_2) for D_{668}, Z_4 x Z_167, Z_668. GA search within each cohomology class.
experiment_seed: Compute H^2(D_{668}, Z_2) in GAP. Test each representative cocycle for orthogonality.
